prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: KPL-GIRLSKEYBOARD-PARENT Product Type: MUSICAL_INSTRUMENT_TOY Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Keyboard Piano Toy Music Player with Lights and Sounds, Girls Ages 3+ (2 Colors) Description: My Little Musician Electronic Musical 16" Kids Piano Playtime Keyboard Set is the perfect musical instrument to let your kids inner rock star shine. This keyboard is not only super fun with an endless amount of creative ways to make sounds and songs but is also an educational way to develop learning skills, making this item a great addition to any child's toy collection.

With 24 keys, 8 timbres, 8 rhythms, 4 animal sounds, 4 drum demos and 8 song demos this is sure to entertain for years to come. Get your kid ready to make their own soundtracks for their next movie or theatrical play in no time. Whether your little rock star likes rock n' roll, disco or funny sounds there's a million songs and sounds that your little one can record.

This keyboard is ready to go whenever and wherever. It is battery operated, made out of durable plastic and even comes with a top carry handle to take on the go. This is a great Christmas present or gift for any occasion. Search Terms: Toys for girls music electric piano fine motor skills birthday present active kids toys preschool learning activities sister Hanukkah Christmas gifts stocking stuffers playroom musical instruments recorder instrument for kids songs parenting pretend Features: - GIRLS MUSIC KEYBOARD: This adorable music keyboard from Kidplokio will surely hit a high note with little gals who love music! The piano keyboard features 24 keys, 8 tempos, 8 rhythms, 4 animal sounds, 4 drum demos, volume control, 8 song demos and flashing lights for lots of fun creativity and learning during playtime - FUN RECORDING DEVICE: Yes, this pretty music keyboard, adorned with flowers and butterflies, comes with a built in music recording device function, meaning little aspiring musicians can create music and record their work for playback for friends and family - FINE MOTOR TOYS: The keyboard piano toy is a great way to introduce music to little kids and toddlers, allowing them to explore lots of different sounds and music with just the push of a few buttons, allowing toddlers to develop their gross and fine motor skills, as well as their dexterity - SCREEN FREE PLAYSET: Give toddlers a break from hours of passive screen watching with Kidplokio's keyboard piano toy! Help little kids activate their mind and imagination, and maybe even develop a passion for music, with this fun, engaging and creative digital piano - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 16 x 10 x 3.5 inches; Weight: 1.84lbs; Color: Pink or Purple; Batteries: Not Included; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 16 inch Kids Piano Keyboard Toy with Lights
